title.en: BELTS, CABLES, OR ROPES, PREDOMINANTLY USED FOR DRIVING PURPOSES; CHAINS; FITTINGS PREDOMINANTLY USED THEREFOR
Driving-belts (V-belts F16G5/00; conveyor belt B65G)
made of leather (F16G1/28 takes precedence; making thereof C14B9/00 {; consisting of several parts F16G1/22})
made of fibrous material, e.g. textiles, whether rubber-covered or not (F16G1/28 takes precedence; making thereof D03D {; consisting of several parts F16G1/22})
made of rubber (F16G1/28 takes precedence {; consisting of several parts F16G1/22}; making thereof B29D29/00 )
made of plastics (F16G1/28 takes precedence {; consisting of several parts F16G1/22}; making thereof B29D29/00 )
made of wire (making thereof B21F43/00 {; consisting of several parts F16G1/22})
made of a single metal strip (making thereof B21D53/14)
built-up from superimposed layers, e.g. zig-zag folded
consisting of several parts
with a contact surface of special shape, e.g. toothed
Belt fastenings, e.g. for conveyor belts (for V-belts F16G7/00)
{Apparatus or tools for joining belts (stapler B25C5/00)}
{Traction devices to bring together belts, cables or chains}
with series of eyes or the like, interposed and linked by a pin to form a hinge (F16G3/09 takes precedence)
with outwardly-bent, mutually-connected belt ends
Friction clamps, e.g. of grommet-thimble type
consisting of plates and screw-bolts or rivets (F16G3/06 takes precedence)
Joining belts by sewing, sticking, vulcanising, or the like; Constructional adaptations of the belt ends for this purpose
Joining belts by lacing
with extensible parts; with resilient parts
Devices or machines for connecting driving-belts or the like
V-belts, i.e. belts of tapered cross-section
made of leather (F16G5/20 takes precedence {; consisting of several parts F16G5/16})
made of rubber (F16G5/02 takes precedence {consisting of several parts F16G5/16})
made of plastics (F16G5/20 takes precedence {consisting of several parts F16G5/16})
consisting of several parts
with a contact surface of special shape, e.g. toothed
built-up from superimposed layers
V-belt fastenings
locked, e.g. riveted
quickly detachable
adjustable, e.g. for tension
Ropes or cables specially adapted for driving, or for being driven by, pulleys or other gearing elements (ropes or cables in general D07B)
made of leather; having enveloping sheathings made of leather
made of rubber or plastics (F16G9/02 takes precedence)

Means for fastening cables or ropes to one another or to other objects; Caps or sleeves for fixing on cables or ropes (attaching ropes or cables to lift cars or cages B66B7/08, to winch drums or barrels B66D1/34; ground anchors E02D5/00; anchoring devices for prestressed members E04C5/00; rope clamps in earth drilling E21B19/12)
with parts deformable to grip the cable or cables; Fastening means which engage a sleeve or the like fixed on the cable
incorporating resiliently-mounted members for attachment of the cable end
with wedging action, e.g. friction clamps (F16G11/02, {F16G11/10} take precedence; {eyes for grommet-thimble type fastenings F16G11/146})
with laterally-arranged screws (F16G11/02, F16G11/04 take precedence)
Fastenings for securing ends of driving-cables to one another, the fastenings having approximately the same diameter as the cables
Quick-acting fastenings; Clamps holding in one direction only
Connections or attachments, e.g. turnbuckles, adapted for straining of cables, ropes, or wire (straining wire in general B21F9/00)

Devices or coupling-pieces designed for easy formation of adjustable loops, e.g. choker hooks; Hooks or eyes with integral parts designed to facilitate quick attachment to cables or ropes at any point, e.g. by forming loops
Chains (making thereof B21L)
Driving-chains (specially adapted to gearings with variable gear-ratio F16H9/00)
Hauling- or hoisting-chains {so called ornamental chains}
Chains having special overall characteristics
Chain couplings, Shackles; Chain joints; Chain links; Chain bushes (making chain elements B21L)
for fastening more or less permanently
Quickly-detachable chain couplings; Shackles {chain links with rapid junction means are classified according to the corresponding kind of chain}
Swivels
Emergency joints or links
Chain links
Hooks as integral parts of chains (hooks for cranes B66C1/34; hooks in general F16B45/00)
